provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
(1) Is-sid ta’ bhejjem tal-]alib g]andu, meta jkollu suspett
li xi wa]da mill-bhejjem tieg]u tkun marida, ji\gura ming]ajr
d ewmien ir-r a[u ni tal -m ard a u g ]an du , jekk ir-r a[u ni t ku n
min]abba xi wa]da mill-mard muri fl-Att dwar is-Sigurtà fl-Ikel,
jew muri f ’xi ordni mag]mul bis-sa]]a tieg]u mill-Ministru,
jg]arraf lis-Suprintendent tas-Sa]]a Pubblika fi \mien erbg]a u
g]oxrin sieg]a minn meta jkun hekk \gura ru]u.

Tag]rif mis-sid u
minn veterinarju.
Kap. 449.

(2) Kull veterinarju li jsir jaf li xi bhima tal-]alib ikollha xi
wa]da mill-mard imsemmi fis-subregolament (1) g]andu minnufih
jg]arraf lis-Suprintendent tas-Sa]]a Pubblika dwar dan.
